name: PAY_FLOW_TASK_INSTANCE_V
query: SELECT pfti.flow_task_instance_id, ChecklistEO.checklist_name, pay_process_flow_utils.get_ui_status(pfti.flow_task_instance_id) AS UI_TASK_STATUS_CODE, pay_process_flow_utils.get_ui_sub_status(pfti.flow_task_instance_id) AS UI_TASK_SUB_STATUS_CODE, pfti.flow_instance_id FROM pay_flow_task_instances pfti,pay_checklist_instances pci, pay_checklists_vl ChecklistEO, pay_flow_instances pfi WHERE pfti.flow_task_instance_id= pci.flow_task_instance_id AND pci.base_checklist_id=ChecklistEO.base_checklist_id AND pfti.flow_instance_id=pfi.flow_instance_id AND ChecklistEO.checklist_id=ChecklistEO.base_checklist_id
